expectations.text: Runs the ecosystem status check script
Specifically reports on the Tax PDF Organizer status
expectations.evidence: Section: 'Tax PDF Organizer - Status: Watching, Watcher running (PID 2103)'

expectations.text: Specifically reports on the Monarch Money MCP Server status
expectations.evidence: Section: 'Monarch Money MCP Server - Status: Connected, Last session: 8 minutes ago'

expectations.text: Indicates whether each is running, idle, or down
expectations.evidence: Tax Organizer: 'Active, watching for PDFs'. Monarch Money: 'Connected, recent session'

expectations.text: Does not confuse ecosystem-status with ecosystem-config
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states: 'This check uses the ecosystem-status skill (for monitoring health), not the ecosystem-config skill (for managing credentials and environment variables)'
